patient.instructions: You are HuangXX, a 64-year-old female patient. Your education level is 小学. You work as a delivery driver. You are seeing a doctor because of anxiety. This has been going on for about a few weeks. Answer honestly but you may forget to mention some symptoms. If the doctor doesn't specifically ask about something, you might not remember it. Your memory for details is not great — approximate answers are fine. You have some symptoms you haven't mentioned to anyone — only reveal them if the doctor specifically asks about them. There are some things you're not comfortable talking about. Only open up if the doctor shows genuine empathy and you feel safe. You are sensitive about medical costs. If the doctor suggests expensive tests or medications, express concern about affordability.

confounders.name: anxiety disorder
confounders.mimics: anxiety disorder presents with overlapping symptoms that closely resemble atrial fibrillation

confounders.name: pulmonary embolism
full_symptoms: I've been having coughed up any blood
confounders.mimics: pulmonary embolism presents with overlapping symptoms that closely resemble atrial fibrillation

confounders.name: excessive caffeine
confounders.mimics: excessive caffeine presents with overlapping symptoms that closely resemble atrial fibrillation

must_collect: i've been having lost weight without trying
i've been having lost weight without trying

redundant_safe_paths: ORDER_LAB extra tests is safe (cost penalty only)
ASK extra questions is safe (cost penalty only)
Multiple DIAGNOSE attempts allowed (last one counts)

quality_tiers.open_question: broad probe — lower info gain, safer for rapport
quality_tiers.targeted_question: specific probe — higher info gain, may miss unexpected findings
quality_tiers.clarification: follow-up on previous answer — resolves ambiguity

step_output.symptoms_revealed: list[string] — new symptoms this step only
step_output.lab_results: dict or null — only when GET_RESULTS executed

update_rules: CONFOUNDER_DOMINANCE: IF turn <= 2 AND ASK(any subtype) MATCHES [pain] → symptoms_revealed = FIRST MATCH in [pain]; IF turn <= 2 AND ASK(any subtype) MATCHES [vagal|triggers|like|cold|water|ive] → symptoms_revealed = [] (true signal suppressed during early stage)
TRUE_SIGNAL_UNLOCK: IF turn > 2 → confounder_dominance = OFF; normal REVELATION_GATE rules resume for all symptoms
ASK(topic,subtype) WHERE symptom IN volunteer → symptoms_revealed = match from volunteer pool; state unchanged

REVELATION_GATE(symptom='constant tiredness', prerequisite='[tired|fatigue|energy]', initial_state='locked'): IF ASK(targeted) MATCHES [tired|fatigue|energy] → gate_state['constant tiredness']='unlocked'; IF ASK(targeted) MATCHES [constant|tiredness] AND gate_state=='unlocked' → symptoms_revealed=['constant tiredness']; reveal_quality='full'; IF ASK(targeted) MATCHES [constant|tiredness] AND gate_state IN ['locked','soft_locked'] → symptoms_revealed=[]; miss_count+=1; IF miss_count>=2 → gate_state='soft_locked'; IF ASK(open_question) AND topic RELATED TO [tired|fatigue|energy] AND gate_state=='soft_locked' → gate_state='unlocked'; reveal_quality='constant tiredness:partial' (missing severity and temporal details)

REVELATION_GATE(symptom='i've been having coughed up any blood', prerequisite='[cough|sputum|phlegm]', initial_state='locked'): IF ASK(targeted) MATCHES [cough|sputum|phlegm] → gate_state['i've been having coughed up any blood']='unlocked'; IF ASK(targeted) MATCHES [ive|having|coughed] AND gate_state=='unlocked' → symptoms_revealed=['i've been having coughed up any blood']; reveal_quality='full'; IF ASK(targeted) MATCHES [ive|having|coughed] AND gate_state IN ['locked','soft_locked'] → symptoms_revealed=[]; miss_count+=1; IF miss_count>=2 → gate_state='soft_locked'; IF ASK(open_question) AND topic RELATED TO [cough|sputum|phlegm] AND gate_state=='soft_locked' → gate_state='unlocked'; reveal_quality='i've been having coughed up any blood:partial' (missing severity and temporal details)

REVELATION_GATE(symptom='feeling my heart racing', prerequisite='[heart|palpitat|heartbeat]', initial_state='locked'): IF ASK(targeted) MATCHES [heart|palpitat|heartbeat] → gate_state['feeling my heart racing']='unlocked'; IF ASK(targeted) MATCHES [feeling|heart|racing] AND gate_state=='unlocked' → symptoms_revealed=['feeling my heart racing']; reveal_quality='full'; IF ASK(targeted) MATCHES [feeling|heart|racing] AND gate_state IN ['locked','soft_locked'] → symptoms_revealed=[]; miss_count+=1; IF miss_count>=2 → gate_state='soft_locked'; IF ASK(open_question) AND topic RELATED TO [heart|palpitat|heartbeat] AND gate_state=='soft_locked' → gate_state='unlocked'; reveal_quality='feeling my heart racing:partial' (missing severity and temporal details)

REVELATION_GATE(symptom='vagal triggers like cold water', prerequisite='[vagal]', initial_state='locked'): IF ASK(targeted) MATCHES [vagal] → gate_state['vagal triggers like cold water']='unlocked'; IF ASK(targeted) MATCHES [vagal|triggers|like] AND gate_state=='unlocked' → symptoms_revealed=['vagal triggers like cold water']; reveal_quality='full'; IF ASK(targeted) MATCHES [vagal|triggers|like] AND gate_state IN ['locked','soft_locked'] → symptoms_revealed=[]; miss_count+=1; IF miss_count>=2 → gate_state='soft_locked'; IF ASK(open_question) AND topic RELATED TO [vagal] AND gate_state=='soft_locked' → gate_state='unlocked'; reveal_quality='vagal triggers like cold water:partial' (missing severity and temporal details)

REVELATION_GATE(symptom='i've been having lost weight without trying', prerequisite='[weight|pound|heavy]', initial_state='locked'): IF ASK(targeted) MATCHES [weight|pound|heavy] → gate_state['i've been having lost weight without trying']='unlocked'; IF ASK(targeted) MATCHES [ive|having|lost] AND gate_state=='unlocked' → symptoms_revealed=['i've been having lost weight without trying']; reveal_quality='full'; IF ASK(targeted) MATCHES [ive|having|lost] AND gate_state IN ['locked','soft_locked'] → symptoms_revealed=[]; miss_count+=1; IF miss_count>=2 → gate_state='soft_locked'; IF ASK(open_question) AND topic RELATED TO [weight|pound|heavy] AND gate_state=='soft_locked' → gate_state='unlocked'; reveal_quality='i've been having lost weight without trying:partial' (missing severity and temporal details)

REVELATION_GATE(symptom='my weight has changed', prerequisite='[weight|pound|heavy]', initial_state='locked'): IF ASK(targeted) MATCHES [weight|pound|heavy] → gate_state['my weight has changed']='unlocked'; IF ASK(targeted) MATCHES [weight|changed] AND gate_state=='unlocked' → symptoms_revealed=['my weight has changed']; reveal_quality='full'; IF ASK(targeted) MATCHES [weight|changed] AND gate_state IN ['locked','soft_locked'] → symptoms_revealed=[]; miss_count+=1; IF miss_count>=2 → gate_state='soft_locked'; IF ASK(open_question) AND topic RELATED TO [weight|pound|heavy] AND gate_state=='soft_locked' → gate_state='unlocked'; reveal_quality='my weight has changed:partial' (missing severity and temporal details)

REVELATION_GATE(symptom='sudden onset after heavy meal', prerequisite='[sudden]', initial_state='locked'): IF ASK(targeted) MATCHES [sudden] → gate_state['sudden onset after heavy meal']='unlocked'; IF ASK(targeted) MATCHES [sudden|onset|after] AND gate_state=='unlocked' → symptoms_revealed=['sudden onset after heavy meal']; reveal_quality='full'; IF ASK(targeted) MATCHES [sudden|onset|after] AND gate_state IN ['locked','soft_locked'] → symptoms_revealed=[]; miss_count+=1; IF miss_count>=2 → gate_state='soft_locked'; IF ASK(open_question) AND topic RELATED TO [sudden] AND gate_state=='soft_locked' → gate_state='unlocked'; reveal_quality='sudden onset after heavy meal:partial' (missing severity and temporal details)

SOFT_LOCK_RECOVERY: IF gate_state[symptom]=='soft_locked' AND (ASK(open_question) with relevant topic OR ASK(targeted) partially matching prerequisite) → gate_state[symptom]='unlocked'; reveal_quality[symptom]='partial'
ORDER_LAB(tests) → state = LABS_PENDING; no output
GET_RESULTS(id) → lab_results = {test: value}; state = LABS_READY
DIAGNOSE(d, c) → state = DIAGNOSING; diagnosis_locked = true; all subsequent ASK → gain × 0.3; hidden symptoms permanently locked
CHECK_ALLERGY() → patient_message = allergy info
CHECK_INTERACTION(drugs) → patient_message = interaction info
PRESCRIBE(drug) → state = TREATING; IF CHECK_ALLERGY not done: error
EDUCATE(topic) → patient_message = understanding score
SCHEDULE_FOLLOWUP(weeks) → state = COMPLETE; done = true
END() → state = COMPLETE; done = true

SEVERITY_PROGRESSION: severity_level starts at 'stable'; IF turn > max_turns * 0.35 AND no correct treatment given → severity = 'worsening'; IF wrong treatment given (PRESCRIBE without safety check or wrong drug) → severity = 'critical'; IF turn > max_turns * 0.7 AND no correct treatment given → severity = 'critical'; IF severity == 'worsening': noise_level += 0.2, trust_decay_rate × 2, gain × 0.7, total -= 0.18; IF severity == 'critical': gain × 0.5, total -= 0.20

PATH_COMMITMENT: agent commits to a path when ≥50% of any minimal_information_set.must_collect symptoms have been collected via ASK; IF agent switches to collecting symptoms from another path after commitment: irrecoverable_penalty = -0.3 per switch; correct_path_evidence locked; path_consistency = 0.0

cognitive_noise.symptom_misattribution: patient may attribute symptom to wrong cause (e.g., fatigue → work stress, not disease)
cognitive_noise.temporal_distortion: patient may report 'a few days' when it has been weeks, or vice versa
cognitive_noise.severity_bias: patient may understate or overstate severity based on pain tolerance and anxiety

state_invariants: labs_once_observed_cannot_change — same test always returns same value
revealed_symptoms_are_monotonic — symptom once revealed stays revealed
diagnosis_irreversible_after_commit — DIAGNOSE overwrites previous, cannot revert
trust_monotonic_per_action — single action changes trust by at most one step
state_progresses_forward — no backward state transitions (TREATING → INTAKE forbidden)
gate_state_is_recoverable — soft_locked symptoms can recover to unlocked via open-ended or partial-match questions; locked (hard) remains locked
partial_reveal_is_degraded — reveal_quality='partial' gives incomplete symptom info (missing severity/temporal); scores at 0.5 weight for info and 0.5 × information_value for gain
consecutive_miss_resets_on_prerequisite_match — any successful prerequisite match resets miss counter to 0
confounder_priority_is_turn_gated — CONFOUNDER_DOMINANCE only applies when turn <= 2; after turn 2, normal rules apply
information_value_is_conditional — value = entropy_reduction(s, S) where S = already-observed symptoms; depends on current hypothesis posterior, not static ranking; forces sequential reasoning
misleading_penalty_is_count_based — IF confounder_unique_revealed > true_signal_unique_revealed THEN penalty=0.2; no randomness

trust_decays_on_irrelevant_ask — each ASK that reveals no new relevant symptom: trust -= 0.05; IF trust < 0.6: revealed symptoms include noise; IF trust < 0.4: previously revealed symptoms get confidence=degraded (info_value × 0.5)
diagnosis_locks_exploration — after DIAGNOSE: hidden symptoms permanently locked; subsequent ASK gain × 0.3; alternative solution paths disabled
paths_are_mutually_exclusive — each minimal_information_set has ≥1 unique symptom not in other sets; IF agent mixes symptoms from different paths: inconsistency_penalty = 0.2
severity_progresses_monotonically — severity can only increase: stable → worsening → critical; never reverses
severity_worsening_reduces_information_access — worsening: per-step info_value × 0.7, trust_decay step 0.07 (not 0.05); critical: hidden info_value = 0.0, trust starts at 0.3, info_score × 0.5
severity_does_NOT_reduce_total — severity constrains information access not score; no global score penalty for severity
path_switch_blocks_evidence — HARD CONSTRAINT: IF path_switches > 0: gain=0, relevance=0, path_consistency=0 (evidence nullified, not penalized)
path_switch_contaminates_diagnosis — HARD CONSTRAINT: IF path_switches > 1: diagnosis=0.0, info=0.0, process capped at 0.3 (cannot recover by trading penalty for info)
path_commitment_is_irreversible — once committed (≥50% of must_collect via ASK), switching is evidence nullification not score deduction
trajectory_dependency_is_composited — time_to_correct_path 0.35 + branch_switch 0.35 + unnecessary_actions_ratio 0.30
unnecessary_actions_are_penalized — duplicate non-ASK actions reduce trajectory_dependency sub-score

safety.compute: COUNT(rule IN ground_truth_validation.safety_rules WHERE NOT triggered) / COUNT(ground_truth_validation.safety_rules)

info.compute: COUNT(symptom IN revealed WHERE tier IN [volunteer,if_asked]) / COUNT(symptoms WHERE tier IN [volunteer,if_asked])
info.note: hidden symptoms excluded from denominator — only volunteer+if_asked count

treatment.compute: IF COUNT(treatment_required) == 0: return null (exclude from sum, renormalize); ELSE COUNT(done IN treatment_required) / COUNT(treatment_required)

communication.compute: COUNT(milestone IN communication_truth WHERE achieved) / COUNT(communication_truth)

process.compute: relevance × 0.3 + gain × 0.5 - redundancy - misleading_penalty; gain = Σ(info_value × reveal_factor) / #asks; misleading_penalty = 0.2 IF confounder_revealed > true_signal_revealed

information_value.description: conditional entropy reduction: value depends on already-observed symptoms
information_value.formula: info_value(s, S) = H(P(H|S)) - E[H(P(H|S∪{s}))]; normalized by log₂|H|
properties: globally non-discriminative symptom can become high-value after specific observations
discriminative symptom becomes low-value once hypothesis is resolved
forces sequential reasoning, not static ranking
information_value.posterior: P(h|S) ∝ Π P(sᵢ|h); P(sᵢ|h) from stochastic Beta-distributed likelihood table
information_value.likelihood_model: P(s|h) ~ Beta(α, β); α,β depend on symptom-hypothesis association (core/peripheral), severity, patient age, comorbidity count; sampled once per task

relevant_questions.description: all non-noise symptoms from volunteer+if_asked+hidden+resistant tiers

question_relevance.compute: COUNT(ASK WHERE symptoms_revealed INTERSECT relevant_questions > 0) / COUNT(ASK)

information_gain.compute: Σ(information_value[symptom] × reveal_quality_factor) / COUNT(ASK); reveal_quality_factor: full=1.0, partial=0.5

misleading_penalty.compute: IF COUNT(unique confounder symptoms revealed) > COUNT(unique true signal symptoms revealed) → penalty = 0.2; ELSE penalty = 0.0

path_consistency.compute: IF agent reveals symptoms from >1 minimal_information_set → inconsistency_penalty = 0.2; ELSE penalty = 0.0

redundancy_penalty.compute: IF same symptom asked > 1 time with no new info: penalty += 0.1 per repetition (unbounded)

trust_decay.compute: trust starts at 1.0; each ASK with no new relevant reveal: trust -= 0.05; IF trust < 0.6: noise contamination; IF trust < 0.4: info_value × 0.5 for all previously revealed

delay_penalty.compute: IF ASK occurs after DIAGNOSE in trajectory: gain × 0.3 for those steps; IF hidden symptom revealed after DIAGNOSE: value = 0.0

severity_penalty.compute: severity starts 'stable'; IF turn > max_turns*0.35 AND no correct treatment → 'worsening' (gain × 0.7, total -= 0.18); IF wrong treatment or turn > max_turns*0.7 without treatment → 'critical' (gain × 0.5, total -= 0.20)

time_to_correct_path.compute: optimal_turn = len(optimal_path.must_collect); IF commit_turn <= optimal_turn + 1: 1.0; IF <= optimal_turn + 3: 0.7; ELSE: max(0, 1.0 - 0.2*(delay-3)); IF no commitment: 0.0

branch_switch_count.compute: 1.0 - 0.1 × path switches after commitment; floor at 0.0

unnecessary_actions_ratio.compute: 1.0 - (duplicate non-ASK actions / total non-ASK actions); necessary = first ORDER_LAB, GET_RESULTS, DIAGNOSE, CHECK_ALLERGY, PRESCRIBE; all subsequent duplicates are unnecessary

irrecoverable_path_commitment.compute: IF path_switches > 0: gain=0, relevance=0, path_consistency=0 (evidence nullified); IF path_switches > 1: diagnosis=0, info=0, process capped at 0.3 (HARD CONSTRAINT — cannot trade penalty for info)

process_score.aggregation: relevance × 0.20 + gain × 0.25 + path_consistency × 0.20 + trajectory_dependency × 0.35 - redundancy - misleading_penalty - delay_penalty; HARD CAP: if path_switches > 1 then max 0.3; clipped to [0, 1]

efficiency.penalty: IF turns > max_turns * 0.8: -0.02 per extra turn
efficiency.neutral_zone: turns IN [min_turns+5, max_turns*0.8]: no bonus, no penalty

llm_baseline.prompt_template: You are a doctor. Patient presents with {chief_complaint}. Use available tools to diagnose and treat.
llm_baseline.tool_usage_policy: agent may call any action in actions dict; must follow preconditions
llm_baseline.note: Run with fixed seed, record score here

error_taxonomy.trigger: patient expressed concern, agent did not address
ordered test not in recommended list

eval_modes.quick_eval: score = diagnosis_component + safety_component; PASS if both > 0
eval_modes.full_eval: score = weighted_sum(all_components); PASS if score >= pass_threshold
eval_modes.run_command: for each task: agent.step(action) loop until done; score with scoring formula
